steps.title: Find the shared pattern
steps.content: The passage first describes Mara Little Hawk blending traditional Apache stories with popular genres. It then says she is not the only Indigenous writer to do this and gives Noah Adler as another example.

steps.title: Remove unsupported main ideas
steps.content: A invents book sales, C invents influence on non-Indigenous authors, and D gives advice that the passage never offers. The main idea is the broader pattern of recent Indigenous fiction mixing traditional stories with popular genres. The answer is B.
